summary: Comprehensive testing of Zyakka food delivery platform MVP. All backend APIs (15/15 tests) and frontend flows passed successfully. Landing page, login/signup, demo accounts, restaurant listings, search/filter, and cart operations all working correctly.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow' instead
Console warnings: Image style.resizeMode deprecated, use props.resizeMode

action_items: Update StyleSheet to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props (landing page, login, signup, home tab)
Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
Consider removing default values from environment variables for fail-fast behavior (backend/server.py lines 21, 23, 25; frontend AuthContext and api.ts)
critical_code_review_comments: Environment variables have default values - should fail fast without defaults: DB_NAME, JWT_SECRET, STRIPE_API_KEY in backend; EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend
All MongoDB queries correctly exclude _id field
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
JWT authentication properly implemented with token expiry
Role-based redirects working correctly (customer → home, kitchen → kitchen dashboard, admin → admin dashboard)
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing seeded data: 6 restaurants, menu items, subscription plans, demo kitchen accounts (kitchen1-6@zyakka.com), demo admin (admin@zyakka.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core MVP features tested and working. Backend API tests cover auth, restaurants, and cart. Frontend tests cover landing page, login/signup flows, demo accounts, home tab with restaurant listings, search/filter functionality. Only minor styling deprecation warnings remain.

backend_tests_passed: Get restaurant by ID with menu items
Get empty cart for new user
Add item to cart with persistence
frontend_tests_passed: Landing page loads with hero image, headline, feature pills (Tiffin Plans, Group Orders, Zero Waste), bento grid, CTA buttons
Navigation from landing to login page
Login page renders with email/password inputs, sign-in button, demo account buttons
Demo kitchen login redirects to /kitchen dashboard
Demo admin login redirects to /admin dashboard
Navigation from landing to signup page
Signup page renders with name, email, phone, password inputs and create account button
User registration flow creates account and redirects to home tab
Home tab displays 6 seeded restaurants with cards
Veg filter shows only vegetarian restaurants
All testID attributes present and working
